title: Incorrect "TOP 1" optimization
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE nextprot.isoform_cellular_components (isoform VARCHAR NOT NULL, annotation VARCHAR NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(isoform, annotation));
CREATE TABLE nextprot.annotation_negative_evidences (annotation VARCHAR NOT NULL, evidence VARCHAR NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(annotation, evidence));
SELECT * FROM nextprot.isoform_cellular_components WHERE isoform = 'NX_P09958-2' AND annotation IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of TOP 1 in query optimization
